title: Geniostoma kaalae
taxonomy: Geniostoma kaalae is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is native to Hawaii and is classified as an evergreen shrub or small tree. The classification of Geniostoma kaalae places it within the genus Geniostoma, which contains several species of flowering plants. The Oleaceae family, to which Geniostoma kaalae belongs, is a group of plants commonly known as the olive family. This classification suggests a close relationship between Geniostoma kaalae and other olive family plants.
